title: Your Certs Are Expiring: Digital Certificate Management Explained
summary: Digital certificate expiration can disrupt websites, APIs, and enterprises. Jeff Crume argues that shorter certificate lifetimes increase operational risk and positions certificate lifecycle management as a critical cybersecurity discipline requiring systematic management.
